itinerary.title: Rameswaram Temple, Dhanushkodi & Memorial
itinerary.description: Visit the holy Ramanathaswamy Temple. Explore the ghost town of Dhanushkodi and visit the Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Memorial Museum. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Theni Grape Farms, Wagamon Meadows & Paruthumpara
itinerary.description: Travel through Cumbum and Theni, stopping to tour local grape farms. Proceed to Wagamon to walk in the Pine Valley Forest and see Mottakunnu meadows and Paruthumpara viewpoints. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Kodaikanal Sightseeing & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive up to Kodaikanal. Enjoy boating on Kodaikanal Lake, visit the majestic Pillar Rocks, and take in the view from Suicide Point before departure. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

title: Rameshwaram, Dhanushkodi & Kodaikanal Tour
description: A diverse journey combining spiritual pilgrimage, historic ghost towns, lush grape farms, and cool hill stations. Visit Rameswaram Temple and Dhanushkodi, tour the grape gardens of Theni, explore Wagamon's pine forests, and see Kodaikanal's lakes and cliffs.
highlights: Visit the historic Ramanathaswamy Temple in Rameswaram
Explore the ghost town of Dhanushkodi and Abdul Kalam Museum
Tour the grape farms of Cumbum and Theni
Walk in the Pine Valley Forest and Mottakunnu hills in Wagamon
Explore Kodaikanal Lake, Pillar Rocks, and Suicide Point
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change
